imposters.reason: 緑 means 'green' (みどり). Uses 糸 (thread) radical on left instead of 金 (metal).
縁 means 'edge/fate' (えん/ふち). Right side uses 彖 (pig snout) instead of 金 (metal).
発 means 'to emit/start' (はつ). First character is 発, not 登. Completely different meaning.
縁 means 'edge/fate'. Right side is 彖 (pig), not 彔 (carve). Top part differs significantly.
録 means 'record'. Left radical is 金 (metal), not 糸 (thread). Metal vs silk — different material.
線 means 'line'. Right side is 泉 (spring/water), not 彔 (carve). The bottom-right component is different.
倹 means 'frugal/thrifty'. Right side has 亻 (person) next to 僉, not ⻖ (hill cliff).
検 means 'examine/inspect'. Right side has 木 (tree) next to 僉, not ⻖ (hill cliff).
剣 means 'sword/blade'. Right side has 刂 (knife) next to 僉, not ⻖ (hill cliff).
係 means 'person in charge' (かかり). Uses 亻 (person) on left, no 子 (child) component.
遜 means 'humble/modest'. Uses ⻌ (walk) radical on left — completely different concept.
孔 means 'hole/cavity' (こう/あな). Missing the entire upper component of 孫.
方 means 'direction' + 立 means 'stand'. Completely different Kanji — no water or step radicals.
津 means 'port/harbor' (つ). Uses 聿 with 氵 to the left, looks similar but means 'port', not 'law'.
待 means 'wait' (まつ). Uses 寺 (temple) instead of 聿 (brush). Different right component.
説 means 'explain/persuade' (とく). Uses 言 (speech) on left, NOT ⺼ (flesh/body radical).
悦 means 'joy/delight' (よろこぶ). Uses 忄 (heart) on left, NOT ⺼ (flesh/body).
税 means 'tax' (ぜい). Uses 禾 (grain) on left, NOT ⺼ (flesh/body).
署 means 'government office'. Uses 罒 (net) + 者 — different bottom radical from 書.
神 means 'god/spirit' (しん/かみ). First character uses 申 (not 必). Completely different.
画 means 'picture/drawing'. 書 (to write) vs 画 (to draw) — different concepts.
接 means 'to join/connect'. This means 'bone setting' (medical procedure), not the fracture itself.
切 means 'to cut'. Bone cutting is surgical — different from bone breaking/fracture.
節 means 'joint/knuckle'. Refers to bone joints, not fractures.
従 means 'obey/follow' (したがう). Uses 彳 (step) + ⺀, different from 徒 which uses 彳 + 走.
待 means 'wait'. Uses 寺 (temple) on right — completely different from 徒.
徙 means 'move/transfer'. Very rare Kanji — uses different right component from 徒.
璧 means 'jade disk' (へき). Uses 玉 (jade) instead of 土 (earth) at the bottom. Precious stone vs wall.
癖 means 'habit/tic' (くせ). Uses 疒 (sickness) radical instead of 土 (earth).
避 means 'avoid/evade'. Uses ⻌ (walk) radical — completely different concept.
持 means 'to hold' (もつ). 招待 uses 待 (wait), not 持 (hold). Different second character.
紹 means 'introduce' (from 紹介). Uses 糸 (thread) on left of first character instead of 扌 (hand).
Combines 紹 (introduce) and 持 (hold) — both characters are wrong for this word.
家 means 'house/home' (いえ/か). First character uses 宀 (roof) + 豕 (pig), not 宀 + 于.
宅 means 'house/residence' (たく). Second character uses 宀 + 乇 (not 由).
守 means 'protect/guard' (まもる). Uses 宀 + 寸 (not 于). Different first character entirely.
材 means 'lumber/material' (ざい). Uses 木 + 才 — different from 林 which uses double 木.
植 means 'plant' (うえる/しょく). Uses 木 + 直 — planting trees, not just the forest itself.
休 means 'rest' (やすむ). Uses 木 + 亻 (person resting by tree). Completely different.
脅 means 'threaten/intimidate' (おどす). Uses 月 + 劦 — different top component from 協.
刀 means 'sword/knife' (かたな). Replaces 力 (power) with 刀 (blade). Different concept.
恊 is a variant form of 協 but uses 心 (heart) at the bottom instead of 十. Outdated/variant character.
険 means 'steep/dangerous' (けわしい). Uses ⻖ (hill cliff) on left instead of 言 (speech/word).
式 means 'style/ceremony' (しき). Uses 弋 (shoot) + 工 — different from 試 (言 + 式).
検 means 'inspect/examine' (けん). Uses 木 (tree) on right instead of 馬 (horse).
雷 means 'thunder/lightning' (かみなり). Uses 雨 (rain) + 田 — not 電 (electricity).
地 means 'ground/earth' (ち/じ). While 電地 sounds plausible, the correct word uses 池 (pond/reservoir).
雷 (thunder) + 地 (ground) — 'thunder ground'. Not a real word. Both characters wrong.
打 means 'to hit/strike' (うつ). Uses 丁 (nail) on right — hand + nail = strike, not break/fold.
祈 means 'to pray' (いのる). Uses 斤 (axe) not 扌 (hand) — shows the radical is on the wrong side.
折る and 折 both exist but the latter is a different conjugation. Still correct Kanji — the trap is using a completely different verb.
計 means 'measure/plan' (けい). Uses 言 (speech) + 十 — different from 敬 (苟 + 攵).
景 means 'scenery' (けい). Uses 日 (sun) + 京 — scenery, not respect.
軽 means 'lightweight' (かるい). Uses 車 (car) + 圣 — opposite of the weight of respect.
送 means 'to send/see off' (おくる). Uses 关 (close) inside ⻌ — different from 追 which uses 㠯.
通 means 'to pass through/commute' (かよう). Uses 甬 inside ⻌ — passing through, not chasing.
迫 means 'to approach/press' (せまる). Uses 白 inside ⻌ — approaching, not pursuing.
雪 means 'snow' (ゆき). Uses 彐 (hand/hook) at bottom, different from 云 at bottom of 雲.
雷 means 'thunder/lightning' (かみなり). Uses 田 (rice field) inside 雨 — completely different weather phenomenon.
霧 means 'fog/mist' (きり). Uses 務 (work/duty) at bottom — different from 云 (say).
矢 means 'arrow' (や). Uses 矢 (arrow) instead of 欠 (yawn/lack). Completely different shape.
失点 means 'conceded points/lost runs' in sports (しってん). 失 is 'lose' — different from 欠 (lack).
決 means 'decide' (けつ). Uses 氵(water) + 夬 — deciding, not lacking.
巡 means 'to patrol/go around' (めぐる). Uses ⻌ + 巛 (river) — patrolling, not escaping.
退 means 'to retreat/step back' (しりぞく). Uses ⻌ + 艮 — stepping back, not fleeing.
避 means 'to avoid/dodge' (さける). Uses ⻌ + 辟 — avoiding, not fleeing.
主述 is a linguistic term meaning 'subject and predicate' — unrelated to surgery.
主術 is a non-existent word. Combines 主 (main) with 術 (technique) but not a valid medical term.
述 means 'to describe/state'. 手述 is not a word — 述 ≠ 術 (technique).
貯 means 'to store/save' (ちょ). Uses 貝 (shell/money) + 宀 — storing, not trading.
質 means 'quality/character' (しつ). Uses 斤 + 貝 — quality, not trade.
昜 is an old variant of 陽 (sun). Bottom is 勿 (not) + 日 — not 易 (easy/exchange). Fake character.
時 means 'time' (とき). 火時 'fire time' is not a word — 時 ≠ 事 (matter/incident).
花 means 'flower' (はな). 花事 'flower matter' is not a standard word. 花 ≠ 火.
火急 means 'urgent' (かきゅう). While related to emergencies, it means 'urgent', not 'fire incident'.
妾 means 'concubine/mistress' (めかけ/しょう). Uses 立 (stand) + 女 — different lower component from 妻.
姉 means 'older sister' (あね). Uses 市 (market) instead of ⺊ + 女 — sister, not wife.
妹 means 'younger sister' (いもうと). Uses 未 (not yet) + 女 — younger sibling, not spouse.
花 means 'flower' (はな). 化 (change/transform) ≠ 花 (flower). Different bottom component.
代 means 'substitute/era' (かわる). While similar meaning, 変化 is the standard word for 'change'.
便 means 'convenience/mail' (べん). Uses 更 (again) on the right instead of 亦 — different character.
角 means 'angle/corner' (かく/つの). In geometry this means 'right angle' — different from 確 (certain).
格 means 'rule/status' (かく). 'Correct rule' ≠ 'correct and certain'. Different nuance.
生 means 'life/raw' (せい/なま). Completely different first character from 正 (correct).
多 means 'many' (おおい). 多人 'many people' is usually read たにん, but the correct for 'others' is 他 (other).
代 means 'substitute/proxy' (かわる/だい). 代人 means 'deputy/proxy', not 'stranger'.
外人 means 'foreigner' (がいじん). While 他 (other) and 外 (outside) are different Kanji with different meanings.
色 means 'color' (いろ/しょく). 形式 uses 式 (style), not 色 (color). Different right character.
刑 means 'punishment' (けい). Uses 刂 (knife) on right — completely different from 形 (shape).
型 means 'model/type' (かた). 型 uses 刑 + 土 — 'model style', similar but not the standard word for 'format'.
単 means 'simple/single' (たん). Uses 口 + 十 — no 弓 (bow) radical. Different concept entirely.
戦 means 'war/battle' (いくさ/せん). Uses 戈 (spear) on right — war vs projectile.
弓 means 'bow' (ゆみ). 弾 contains 弓 but also has 単 on the right — they are different characters.
窗 means 'window' (そう). Uses 囱 (chimney) — window of universe doesn't make sense.
家 means 'house' (いえ/か). First character uses 豕 (pig) — house universe? Not a real word.
宗 means 'religion/sect' (しゅう). Uses 示 (altar) — religion + universe, different meaning.
立 means 'stand' (たつ). 申し立む is not standard — 立 ≠ 込 (go in/insert).
混む means 'be crowded' (こむ). 混 uses 日 + 比 — mixing, not inserting.
由 means 'reason/cause' (ゆう/よし). Uses 由 (reason) instead of 申 (say/speak).
音 means 'sound' (おと/おん). 暗 (dark) ≠ 音 (sound). Different top component: 立+日 vs 音.
案 means 'plan/proposal' (あん). Uses 安 (peace) + 木 — planning, not memorizing.
紀 means 'era/record' (き). Uses 己 (self) — 記憶 (memory) uses 己, but 暗記 uses 言 (say).
所 means 'place' (ところ). 内所 'inside place' ≠ 内緒 'secret'. 緒 (thread/beginning) vs 所 (place).
初 means 'first/begining' (はつ/しょ). 内初 'inside beginning' — not a word.
書 means 'write/book' (しょ). 内書 'inside writing' — different from 緒 (thread).
賀 means 'congratulations' (が). Uses 加 (add) + 貝 (shell) — congratulations, not lending.
貨 means 'currency/freight' (か). Uses 化 (change) + 貝 — goods/money, not the action of lending.
賞 means 'prize/praise' (しょう). Uses 尚 (esteem) + 貝 — award, not loan.
亀 means 'turtle' (かめ) + 拉 means 'pull/crush'. Fake compound for 'camera'.
加(add) + 目(eye) + 良(good). Created to sound like 'camera' but not a real word.
可(possible) + 面(face/mask). Not related to camera at all.
宇 means 'eaves/universe'. Uses 于 (at/from) — universe ≠ protect.
安 means 'peace/cheap' (やすい). Uses 女 under roof — peace ≠ protect.
宝 means 'treasure' (たから). Uses 玉 (jade) under roof — treasure ≠ protect.
質 means 'quality/substance' (しつ). Uses 斤 (axe) + 貝 (shell) — substance ≠ truth.
実 uses 宀 (roof) + 大 (big) + 玉 (jade). 真実 is the correct pair.
新 means 'new' (あたらしい). 新実 'new truth' ≠ 真実 'true truth'. First character different.
夢 uses 苜 (eye) + 冖 (cover) + 夕 (evening). This is the correct character.
蕾 means 'flower bud' (つぼみ). Uses 艹 (grass) + 雷 (thunder) — flower bud, not dream.
暮 means 'evening/livelihood' (くらす/ぼ). Uses 大 (big) + 日 (sun) — evening ≠ dream.
各 means 'each/every' (かく). Missing the 宀 (roof) radical entirely.
額 means 'forehead/amount' (がく). Uses 頁 (head) — different character with more strokes.
格 means 'status/rule' (かく). Uses 木 (tree) + 各 — status ≠ guest.
汁 means 'soup/juice' (しる). Uses 十 (ten) — juice ≠ sweat. Different right component.
干 means 'dry' (ほす/かん). Missing 氵 (water radical) — dry ≠ sweat.
汚 means 'dirty' (きたない/お). Uses 亏 (deficiency) — dirty ≠ sweat.
嶋 is a variant of 島 (shimauji) used in names. Same meaning, different character form.
鳥 means 'bird' (とり). Very similar visually: 島 has 山 (mountain) on top, 鳥 does not.
烏 means 'crow/raven' (からす). Missing the 山 (mountain) top and has different bottom.
弓 means 'bow' (ゆみ). Missing ム(厶) component — just a bow, not strong.
張 means 'stretch' (はる). Uses 弓 + 長 (long) — stretching ≠ strong.
堅 means 'hard/solid' (かたい). Uses 土 (earth) + 臣 (retainer) — hard ≠ strong.
宇 means 'eaves/universe'. Uses 于 — 宇 ≠ 字 (character). Different bottom component.
安 means 'peace/cheap'. Uses 女 (woman) under roof — unrelated to character.
宅 means 'house/residence'. Uses 乇 — text house ≠ text character.
降 means 'descend/surrender' (くだる). 以降 means 'after/from now on' — temporal, not spatial.
外 means 'outside' (そと/がい). 以外 means 'except/besides' — different from 'below'.
内 means 'inside' (うち/ない). 以内 means 'within' — inside the boundary vs below it.
吏 means 'government official' (り). Uses 一 + 人 + 乂 — official ≠ history (史).
塞 means 'to block/close' (ふさぐ). Uses 宀 + 井 + 土 — blocking cold vs feeling cold are different.
冷 means 'cold to touch' (つめたい). 寒 is atmospheric cold, 冷 is tactile cold — different concept.
冫 is the 'ice' radical (two dots). Not a real Kanji by itself — needs another component.
昔 means 'old times/long ago' (むかし). Uses 廿 + 日 — completely different from 借 (亻 + 昔).
惜 means 'regret/frugal' (おしい/せき). Uses 忄(heart) on left — regretting, not borrowing.
措 means 'to set aside/omit' (そ). Uses 扌 + 昔 — setting aside ≠ borrowing.
孝 means 'filial piety' (こう). Uses 耂 (old) + 子 (child) — different top component from 教.
敬 means 'respect' (うやまう). Uses 苟 + 攵 — respecting ≠ teaching.
収 means 'to obtain/collect' (おさめる). Uses 丩 + 又 — collecting ≠ teaching.
Same as correct — 大切 is correct. But だいせつ is not the standard reading; it's たいせつ.
接 means 'to connect/join' (せつ). Connecting ≠ cutting/being important.
裁 means 'to judge/cut cloth' (さばく/さい). Different meaning entirely.
幼 means 'infant/childhood' (よう/おさない). Weight + child ≠ importance.
洋 means 'ocean/Western style' (よう). Uses 氵 + 羊 — ocean ≠ essential.
用 means 'use' (よう). 重用 exists but means 'to put in an important position' — it's a different word.
義 means 'justice/righteousness' (ぎ). Uses 羊 + 我 — justice ≠ beauty.
養 means 'to nourish/raise' (やしなう). Uses 食 (eat) — feeding ≠ beauty.
羨 means 'envy/jealousy' (うらやましい). Uses 次 + 氵 — envy ≠ beauty.
This IS correct. The trap is confusing it with 決まる (intransitive).
快 means 'pleasant/comfortable' (こころよい). Uses 忄(heart) + 夬 — comfort ≠ decision.
挟 means 'to pinch/insert' (はさむ). Uses 扌 + 夹 — pinching ≠ deciding.
争 means 'to dispute/fight' (あらそう). Uses 爫 + 彐 + 亅 — fighting ≠ hurrying.
負 means 'to carry/lose' (おう/まける). Uses 刀 + 貝 — carrying/losing ≠ hurrying.
象 means 'elephant/image' (ぞう/かたち). Completely different meaning.
合う means 'to fit/match' (あう). While it shares the same yomikata, 会う is for people-meeting, 合う is for things-fitting.
全 means 'whole/complete' (ぜん/まった). Uses 王 + 土 — completing ≠ meeting.
金 means 'gold/money' (きん/かね). Gold ≠ meeting someone.
Same character, different font rendering. The key is the bottom: 丂 vs correct form.
孝 means 'filial piety' (こう). Uses 耂 + 子 — filial respect ≠ thinking.
老 means 'to grow old' (おいる). Uses 耂 + 匕 — aging ≠ thinking.
刂 is the 'knife' radical — not a character on its own. Not a real word.
左 means 'left' (ひだり). 左 (left hand) ≠ 差 (difference). Different top component.
着 means 'to wear/arrive' (きる/ちゃく). Wearing ≠ distinction.
楽 means 'comfort/pleasure/music' (たのしい/がく). Uses 白 + 木 — music/pleasure ≠ medicine.
東 means 'east' (ひがし). Uses 木 + 日 — completely different.
菜 means 'vegetable/greens' (な). Uses 艹 + 采 — vegetables ≠ medicine.
晚 is the old/orthodox form of 晩. Uses 日 + 免 instead of 日 + 免. Same meaning, different stroke order.
暖 means 'warm' (あたたかい). Uses 日 + 爰 — warmth ≠ evening.
暗 means 'dark' (くらい). Uses 日 + 音 — darkness ≠ the concept of evening specifically.
御 means 'honorific' (ご/お). 御飯 is technically correct as an elevated form, but ご飯 is the standard modern spelling.
反 means 'anti/opposite' (はん/そる). Food + opposite ≠ cooked rice.
飲 means 'to drink' (のむ). Drinking ≠ eating. 飯 specifically refers to rice/meal.
色色 is the older/formal way of writing 色々. Both are used, but 色々 with the repetition mark is more common.
巴 means 'tomoe/whirlpool' (ともえ). Uses 巳 — completely different from 色 (person + kneeling).
艶 means 'glossy/charm' (つや). 艶々 means 'glossy/lustrous' — different meaning.
問 means 'question/problem' (とい/もん). Uses 口 + 門 — question ≠ interval (間).
旦 means 'dawn/sunrise' (した/たん). Dawn ≠ daytime/noon.
書 means 'to write/book' (かく/しょ). Writing ≠ daytime.
山(mountain) + 十(ten). Just two separate radicals — not a real Kanji compound.
山上 means 'on the mountain' (さんじょう/やまうえ). On top of mountain ≠ mountain pass.
山口 means 'mountain mouth/entrance' (やまぐち). Entrance ≠ mountain pass peak.
体 means 'body' (からだ/たい). Uses 亻 + 本 — body ≠ rest.
木 means 'tree' (き). Just a tree — missing the person (亻) leaning on it.
床 means 'floor/bed' (とこ/ゆか). Uses 广 + 木 — floor ≠ the action of resting.
学 means 'to study/learn' (まなぶ/がく). Uses 尚 + 子 — studying ≠ remembering (覚 contains 見).
見える means 'to be visible' (みえる). Visible to the eye ≠ committing to memory.
賞 means 'prize/praise' (しょう). Uses 尚 + 貝 — awarding ≠ memorizing.
忙 means 'busy' (いそがしい). Uses 忄(heart) + 亡 — busy ≠ forget (忘 = 亡 + 心).
死 means 'death' (しぬ). Uses 歹 + 匕 — death ≠ forgetting.
妄 means 'reckless/delusion' (もう). Uses 亡 + 女 — delusion ≠ forgetting.
当 is the correct second character. Uses 氵 + 彐 + 寸 (variant). This IS correct.
堂 means 'hall/temple' (どう). Uses 尚 + 土 — main hall ≠ truth.
町 means 'town/street' (ちょう/まち). Uses 田 + 丁 — town ≠ truth.
語 means 'language/word' (ご/かたる). 語す is not a standard verb form — 話す is correct.
計 means 'to measure/plan' (はかる). Uses 言 + 十 — measuring ≠ speaking.
説 means 'theory/explain' (せつ/とく). 説す is not standard — 説明する or 説く are correct.
開く means 'to open' (ひらく/あく). Uses 門 + 廾 — opening ≠ hearing.
関 means 'barrier/related' (せき/かん). Uses 門 + 关 — barrier ≠ hearing.
閉 means 'to close' (しめる/とじる). Uses 門 + 才 — closing ≠ hearing.
売 means 'to sell' (うる/ばい). Uses 士 + 儿 + 冖 — selling ≠ reading.

科 means 'department' (か). Department ≠ camera.
仮 means 'temporary/fake' (かり/か). Temporary ≠ camera.
東 means 'east' (ひがし/とう). East ≠ car. 車 has the shape of a car (wheels + axle).
庫 means 'warehouse' (くら/こ). Uses 广 + 車 — garage/warehouse ≠ the car itself.
運 means 'to carry/fate' (はこぶ/うん). Transport ≠ the vehicle car.
者 means 'person' (もの/しゃ). Self-rotation person ≠ bicycle (車 = vehicle).
社 means 'company' (しゃ). Self-rotation company ≠ bicycle.
体 means 'body' (からだ/たい). Self-body car ≠ bicycle (転 = rotate).
航 means 'navigate by sea' (こう). Flying navigation ≠ flying machine (行 = go/travel).
器 means 'vessel/container' (うつわ/き). Flying vessel ≠ flying machine (機 = mechanism).
幸 means 'happiness' (しあわせ/こう). Flying happiness ≠ airplane.
舟 is the 'boat' radical (ふね/しゅう). Usually part of compounds — 船 is the standard standalone character for vessel.
舶 means 'ocean-going ship' (はく). Uses 舟 + 白 — large ships ≠ general boats/ships.
艦 means 'warship' (かん). Uses 舟 + 監 — military vessel ≠ general boat.
伝 means 'transmit' (つたえる/でん). Transmit car ≠ electric train.
店 means 'shop' (みせ/てん). Shop car ≠ electric train.
転 means 'to rotate' (ころがる/てん). Rolling car ≠ electric car/train (電 = electricity).
場 means 'place' (ば/じょう). Place ≠ bus.
馬 means 'horse' (うま/ば). Horse ≠ bus.
波 means 'wave' (なみ/は). Wave ≠ bus.
宅 means 'house' (たく). House ≠ taxi.
沢 means 'swamp/abundance' (さわ/たく). Swamp ≠ taxi.
卓 means 'table/desk' (たく). Table ≠ taxi.
社 means 'company/shrine' (しゃ). Medical company ≠ medical person (者 = person).
学 means 'study/learning' (まなぶ/がく). Medical study (medicine) ≠ the person who practices it.
科 means 'department' (か). Medical department ≠ the doctor itself.
